stem: Parallelogram WXYZ is similar to parallelogram JKLM. The length of each side of parallelogram JKLM is 3 times the length of its corresponding side of parallelogram WXYZ. The area of parallelogram WXYZ is 7 square centimeters. What is the area, in square centimeters, of parallelogram JKLM?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. For similar figures, the ratio of areas is the square of the linear scale factor. With scale factor 3, the area ratio is 9, so the area of JKLM is 9 × 7 = 63 square centimeters.

Choice A multiplies by 3 instead of 9. Choice C ignores the original area. Choice D uses an unrelated value.
